Node started: For a freely jointed chain of n segments of length l, derive the expression for the internal energy U as a function of the end-to-end distance x under adiabatic conditions. Assume the system follows the microcanonical ensemble or that the temperature changes such that entropy is constant. Focus on finding the relationship between U and x.

Node started: Given the internal energy U(x) derived for a thermally isolated freely jointed polymer chain, calculate the force F(x) using the thermodynamic relation F = dU/dx. Ensure the result is expressed in terms of n, l, and x.
